content_html:
31st May 2026

A minor bugfix release. Fixes a bug with 

INSERT ... RETURNING
queries via the new /db/-/execute-write endpoint and a bunch of base_url issues which showed up when I was experimenting with Service Workers yesterday.

Recent articles

  • Claude Opus 4.8: "a modest but tangible improvement"- 28th May 2026
  • I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit- 27th May 2026
  • Notes on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical on AI- 25th May 2026
